# kemp_owasp_custom_rule (Resource)

Uploads a custom OWASP/ModSecurity rule file (admin-level). Once uploaded, the file is referenced by name from `kemp_virtual_service_waf_rule` to attach to specific virtual services.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_owasp_custom_rule" "company_rules" {
  filename = "company_owasp.conf"
  data     = base64encode(file("${path.module}/company_owasp.conf"))
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String, Sensitive) **Required.** Base64-encoded rule file content. Use `base64encode(file("path/to/rule.conf"))`. Forces replacement if changed.
- `filename` (String) **Required.** Filename including extension (e.g. `owaspcust.conf`). Forces replacement if changed.
